title: In exercise of the powers conferred by clause a of sub section 3 of section 3 of the Micro Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act

(iii) 灙म सं榐या 3 और उससे संबंिधत 灹िवि玗य犘 को लोप कर 琈दया जाएगा ; [फा. सं. 1(19)/2013-एनबीएमएसएमई] राम मोहन िम炈ा, अपर सिचव एवं िवकास आयु猴 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण म犆 का.आ. सं榐या 1274(अ), तारीख 24 अ灹ैल, 2017 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 22nd December, 2017 S.O. 4009(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of sub-section (3) of section 3 of the Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Development Act, 2006 (27 of 2006), read with rule 3 of the National Board for Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Rules, 2006, the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.O. 1274 (E), dated the 24th April, 2017, namely:- (i) In the said notification,- for serial number 1 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:- "1. Shri Giriraj Singh, Minister of State (Independent Charge), Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises - Chairperson – ex officio” (ii) serial number 2 and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted; (iii) serial number 3 and the entries relating thereto shall be omitted; [F.No.1(19)/2013- NBMSME] RAM MOHAN MISHRA, Addl. Secy. And Development Commissioner Note. The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.O.1274(E), dated the 24th April, 2017. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
